description: Style NoteGet dressed in these sandals from catwalk for a glammed up look. The synthetic straps with the gold edges lends a dose of sophisticated style to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe.Product DetailsSandal with two forefoot straps and a toe separatorAn ankle strap with an elasticated strap looping around the ankleSmooth footedTextured TPU outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
